claude_cli.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools Read,Grep,Glob --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit --output-format json

findings.title: Unused forward-looking test helper
findings.summary: createHermesValidationStateTransitionEnforcementResult(overrides = {}) is currently unused, mirrors the M02 sibling pattern, and is expected to be consumed by S10.

required_followups: Create docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m03-s09 closeout evidence so npm run rp00:control-plane:validate passes; this is the normal post-review closeout step, not a code defect.
review_notes: Scope is confined to S09 with no edits to S01-S08 logic, other entrypoints, routes, or UI.
S02-S08, M00, permission/audit, TEN-001 through TEN-008, validation contexts, and acceptance gates are carried and pinned by the result validator.
Missing, invalid, wrong-source S08 input and every forbidden or unknown non-false claim throw fail-closed.
All hazard flags are hard false; result and receipt are frozen and metadata-only.
Policy, service, validators, tests, fixture, README, contract, and RP00 validator align; fixture parity is full deepEqual.
parsed_review.summary: RP00.P02.M03.S09 is a clean, additive, metadata-only Hermes Validation State transition enforcement implementation. Claude reported PASS / GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings and one informational P3 finding that does not block closeout. The only required follow-up is normal S09 closeout evidence creation.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned PASS / GO with no P0/P1/P2 findings; only a P3 informational note about an unused forward-looking test helper and the normal S09 closeout evidence follow-up.
